recommendations.title: The Princess Switch
recommendations.overview: When a down-to-earth Chicago baker and a soon-to-be princess discover they look like twins, they hatch a Christmastime plan to trade places.

recommendations.title: The Princess Switch: Switched Again
recommendations.overview: When Duchess Margaret unexpectedly inherits the throne & hits a rough patch with Kevin, it’s up to Stacy to save the day before a new lookalike — party girl Fiona — foils their plans.

recommendations.title: My Secret Santa
recommendations.overview: A single mom needs a job. A ski resort needs a Santa. Disguised as a St. Nick lookalike, can Taylor fool a charming hotel heir into ho-ho-hiring her?

recommendations.title: The Princess Switch 3: Romancing the Star
recommendations.overview: A priceless relic is stolen from identical royals Queen Margaret and Princess Stacy, who enlist the help of their sketchy look-alike cousin Fiona Pembroke to retrieve it.

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Drake & Josh
recommendations.overview: Step brothers Drake and Josh must give a foster family the best Christmas ever or face years in jail for a Christmas party gone wrong.

recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: A young boy makes a snowman one Christmas Eve, which comes to life at midnight and takes him on a magical adventure to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus.

recommendations.title: Miracle on 34th Street
recommendations.overview: Kris Kringle, seemingly the embodiment of Santa Claus, is asked to portray the jolly old fellow at Macy's following his performance in the Thanksgiving Day parade. His portrayal is so complete that many begin to question if he truly is Santa Claus, w

recommendations.title: Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Sam the snowman tells us the story of a young red-nosed reindeer who, after being ousted from the reindeer games because of his glowing nose, teams up with Hermey, an elf who wants to be a dentist, and Yukon Cornelius, the prospector. They run into t

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.

recommendations.title: Let It Snow
recommendations.overview: In a small town on Christmas Eve, a snowstorm brings together a group of young people. They soon find their friendships and love lives colliding, and come Christmas morning, nothing will be the same.
